features.name: Baseline & Verification
features.description: Clean checkout installs and verifies: pnpm install, lint, test (backend+admin), build across backend/admin/public, plus pnpm tc type-check. Docker stack (docker compose up) and Prisma migrate/seed run from clean state.
features.evidence: Root package.json scripts: dev/build/test/lint/tc; docker-compose.yml; backend/prisma migrations + db:seed-all

features.name: User / Auth (backend)
features.description: User accounts, login, AuthGuard + RolesGuard role-based access. Foundation every protected module depends on.
features.evidence: backend SharedModule AuthGuard/RolesGuard; User/Auth module per docs/architecture.md section 2

features.name: PageLayout module (backend)
features.description: Page layout CRUD, publish, schedule, clone. Puck-based layout templates that Posts clone into.

features.name: Post module (backend)
features.description: Post CRUD, clone-into-layout (POST /posts/:id/clone-into-layout injects post into puckData), cron publish (per-minute in-process cron).
features.evidence: backend Post module; clone-into-layout endpoint + cron publish per docs/architecture.md section 3

features.name: Widget / Media / Subscription / Visitor (backend)
features.description: Widget registry, Media upload+tag, tag-based Subscription notify, Visitor analytics. Supporting domain modules.
features.evidence: backend Widget/Media/Subscription/Visitor modules per docs/architecture.md section 2; db:seed-widgets script

features.name: Redis cache invalidation
features.description: Redis as read-cache via CacheManager + KeyvRedis. On any write, the owning NestJS service clears affected cache keys. Backend stays stateless.
features.evidence: SharedModule CacheManager + KeyvRedis; write-then-clear pattern per docs/architecture.md section 1

features.name: Admin Console (frontend, :3000)
features.description: Next.js admin app (workspace 'admin', dir frontend/). Post/layout authoring, Puck editor, media manager. Calls NestJS API. Sentry + Playwright e2e + vitest.
features.evidence: frontend/ Next.js app name=admin; playwright.config.ts; sentry.*.config.ts

features.name: Public Site (frontend-public, :3002)
features.description: Next.js public-facing site (workspace 'public', dir frontend-public/). Renders published page layouts and posts from NestJS API.
features.evidence: frontend-public/ Next.js app name=public; public render flow per docs/architecture.md section 3

features.name: Legacy migration
features.description: Execute the migration plan in docs/legacy-migration-plan.md. Confirm scope, dependencies, and verification before starting.

features.name: Admin Management (super-admin only)
features.description: Super-admin-only page at /admin/admins listing all admins (name + email, department, status Active/Offline/Disabled, last login). Stat cards: Total Admins, Active Now (= lastLoginAt within 5 min). Subroute /admin/admins/new with form: avatar (Media picker), first/last name, login email, position, department (select existing or create new inline), default password. POST /auth/create-admin (already SuperAdmin-guarded) + new GET /admins endpoint. Sidebar renames 'Users & Roles' to 'Admin Management' and only renders for SUPER_ADMIN role. Login flow now stamps lastLoginAt. P0 ships without filter / bulk select / sub-role tabs (deferred).
features.evidence: Backend admin module (GET /admins paged + activeNow); auth.createAdmin extended with avatarUrl; login touches lastLoginAt. Admin routes /admin/admins + /admin/admins/new with table, stat cards, create form (inline new-department, Media picker avatar). Sidebar guards 'Admin Management' link behind SUPER_ADMIN role.

features.name: Widgets-layout versioning (published + archived) with rollback
features.description: Add version history to PageLayout: persist a snapshot of puckData (+ metadata: title, slug, publishedAt, publishedBy) every time a layout is published or unpublished. Mark prior published version as ARCHIVED/STALE when a new one goes live. Admin UI: version list panel inside widgets-layout editor with status badges (CURRENT / ARCHIVED), preview each version, one-click rollback (clone archived snapshot back to draft or directly republish). Backend: new PageLayoutVersion model (Prisma), endpoints list/get/rollback, cron-aware (scheduled publish must also create a version row). Public site renders only the current published version; archived rows are admin-only.
features.evidence: Prisma migration 20260531033039_add_page_layout_versions; backend page-layout module: listVersions (lazy-backfills v1 when published layout has 0 rows) / getVersion / rollbackVersion (modes: draft / republish); admin route /admin/widgets-layout/[id]/version-history with side-by-side JSON diff modal; 16/16 backend unit tests pass (publish snapshot ordering, rollback slug-conflict-before-mutation, lazy backfill, cron snapshot).
